---
name: bug report
about: "make a descriptive bug report \U0001F62E"
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**evidence**
try and give a screenshot or video of the bug happening if possible, otherwise give an explanation on how to reproduce it

**mods list**
go to geode settings then click copy mods list and paste it here

**platform**
indicate what platform you are playing on (windows, android, etc)

**verification**
please ensure that the both Superb Input Precision and Subtick Inputs API are updated to the latest version before submitting your report

**does it happen with cbf?**
if possible, check if cbf has the same issue and indicate it

**come back later**
come back to your report a few days later to see if i’ve sent any message, perhaps asking for more clarification

**patience**
i’m the only one working on this mod and c++ isn’t easy 😢
